remedy.notes: $1,001 personal sanction + 4 hours CLE + circulation/certification requirements; associate Katherine Cervantes was separately sanctioned (Dkt. 161). Caption shares the name "Workday" with AIEL-2025-018 (Mobley) but is unrelated to the hiring-tool matter — here Workday is merely the opposing party and the AI misconduct is by plaintiff’s counsel.
